title: sericocarpus oregonensis var. californicus
intro: Sericocarpus oregonensis var. californicus, also known as California white goldenrod, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of California white goldenrod include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe various ailments.
